description: You are a SLAM engineer validating a particle filter algorithm. The simulation world is loaded with a CLEANING_ROBOT, but its sensors currently produce perfect, noise-free data. Degrade the sensors to match the physical hardware profile by setting the resolution to 0.0123 and noise to 0.015 for both the "left_encoder" and "right_encoder" wheel encoders. Additionally, set the resolution to 0.002 and noise to 0.05 for the "ir_front", "ir_left", and "ir_right" infrared distance sensors. Save the modified world to /home/ga/Desktop/noisy_slam_test.wbt.
